subject: [PATCH v2 078/110] cramfs: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch looks good, but there's a minor issue with the commit message. It should be 'cramfs' instead of 'f2fs'.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch series replaces the PRIino format macro with concrete format strings %llu/%llx in cramfs, reflecting the change of i_ino to u64.
